META_DESC: Lovely to have you with us. Your welcome gift is ready at Hotel Asteria in Venray, with code 'WELKOM'.
HERO_SUBTITLE: Take your time, enjoy, and feel at home at Asteria. Your welcome gift is already waiting with code 'WELKOM'.
ARR_C_ARIA: Your welcome gift, what you get
ARR_C_RATING_ARIA: 4.2 out of 5 stars from 2,219 Google reviews
ARR_C_INTRO: On your first stay with code 'WELKOM', this is waiting for you in your room.
ARR_C_F1_DESC: A lovely bottle of bubbles waiting in your room on arrival.
ARR_C_F2_DESC: For an afternoon in the wellness or a slow, easy morning.
ARR_C_F3_DESC: For the wellness, so you have nothing to bring along.
ARR_C_FINEPRINT: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before arrival. Subject to availability.
REVIEWS_FALLBACK_JS: [{author:'Danielle',time:'14-08-2025',rating:5,text:'Two lovely days with dinner, breakfast and a late check-out. A drink on the terrace, the room neat and clean, the staff friendly. We will certainly come back.'},{author:'Eddy',time:'12-06-2025',rating:5,text:'The location is perfect: close to the motorway and yet near the town. The breakfast was very good, and the staff always helpful and friendly.'},{author:'Cornelia O.',time:'2024',rating:5,text:'Very well organised and a lovely room. Great hotel, we are happy to return.'},{author:'Martin V.',time:'2024',rating:4,text:'Beautiful location and friendly staff. The dinner was excellently prepared.'},{author:'The Janssen family',time:'2025',rating:5,text:'We felt welcome right away. A lovely dinner in the brasserie and a nice, clean room.'}]
OMG_BODY: Noord-Limburg at its finest. Walk or cycle through the Maasduinen and the woods around Venray, and come home to Asteria at the end of the day.
OMG_IMG_ALT: Cyclists in the surroundings of Hotel Asteria
ROOMS_SUB: Upgrade for more comfort or privacy

ROOM_DELUXE_DELTAS: more space + private infrared sauna
ROOM_JUNIOR_DELTAS: spacious seating area + bathtub + mini fridge
ROOM_SUITE_DELTAS: private infrared sauna + spacious seating area + mini fridge
ROOM_BRUIDSSUITE_DELTAS: freestanding bath + walk-in shower + mini fridge
DINER_BG_ARIA: Woman enjoying a glass of bubbles in the bubble bath at Hotel Asteria
DINER_SUB: A bottle of bubbles, a soft bathrobe and a bath towel in your room on your first stay with code 'WELKOM'.

BEL1_TEXT: Vast dunes, quiet woods and hundreds of kilometres of cycling and walking trails, right behind the hotel.
BEL2_TEXT: One of the finest gardens in the Netherlands. Ideal for an afternoon full of colour, calm and culture.
BEL3_TEXT: Noord-Limburg has some of the finest cycling routes in the Netherlands, through hills and along the Maas.
BEL4_TEXT: A tour of the best-known brewery in Limburg, with a tasting and a look behind the brewing process.
